title: malus cerea
intro: Malus cerea, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as supporting the immune system and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the bark and fruit of Malus cerea are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
